name: pow-reconcile
description: Hourly state reconciler for Protect Our Winters — catches stuck ClickUp/GitHub/SF state
notes: Runs daily at 14:00 UTC (≈9am EST / 6am PST) — ~8 hours after the nightly poll at 06:00 UTC, so anything stuck from the overnight batch gets caught before Joe starts his review. Read-only on Salesforce. Can move ClickUp tasks forward to match observed downstream state; never moves tasks backward. Posts Slack alerts for ambiguous cases that need human review. ClickUp and Slack interactions use MCP connectors (not curl) — the environment MUST have ClickUp and Slack connectors attached. Auth is handled by the connectors, so no CLICKUP_API_KEY or SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL is needed. Budget: 1 routine run per day per client.
